case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. BRAD MANZER

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES HEARING SET FOR OCT-17-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 501
UD COURT CALENDAR OF OCT-17-2016 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON OCT-17-2016 AT 9:20 AM IN DEPT. 514, JOSEPH M. QUINN. (501)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MANZER, BRAD

COURT TRIAL ON OCT-17-2016 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED. TODD ROTHBARD, ESQ., APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES. NO APPEARANCE BY OR ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT BRAD MANZER. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: A. MOK. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MITCH LYON, CSR#6840. (514)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANZER, BRAD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1190 MISSION STREET, APARTMENT #1914, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94103 $7,127.69 RENT, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,462.69, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-17-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for short cause trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Todd Rothbard, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES.
Witness: Jackie Lopez sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Brad Manzer.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-V dismissed without prejudice.

Plaintiff's Exhibits:
1-Notice of time and place of trial
2-Residential Rental Agreement
3-Three Day Notice to Pay rent or Quit
Court returned exhibits to Plaintiff.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1190 Mission Street, Apartment #1914, San Francisco, California 94103.

Damages $7,127.69
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $335
for a Total Judgment of $7,462.69

Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-17-2016 Assigned To Trial Court
